scripts.cache:clean: rm -rf $(echo bun pm cache) && rm -rf node_modules && rm bun.lock || true
scripts.build:all: bun run --cwd packages/shared-utils build && bun run --cwd packages/profanity-filter build && bun run --cwd packages/dota build && bun run --cwd packages/twitch-chat build && bun run --cwd packages/twitch-events build && bun run --cwd packages/steam build
scripts.typecheck:all: bun run --cwd packages/shared-utils typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/profanity-filter typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/dota typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/twitch-chat typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/twitch-events typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/steam typecheck
scripts.test:all: bun run --cwd packages/shared-utils test && bun run --cwd packages/profanity-filter test && bun run --cwd packages/dota test && bun run --cwd packages/twitch-events test && bun run --cwd packages/twitch-chat test
